SEARCH
Package com.example.eventplanner

Class Events

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventplanner.Events
public class Events extends Object
Represents an event in the event planner application. Supports Firestore persistence + waiting list behavior.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Events()
    No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
    Events(String name, String date, String description, String location)
    Constructs a minimal event with core details.
    Events(String eventId, String organizerId, String name, String date, String description, String location, int capacity, String status, com.google.firebase.Timestamp createdAt)
    Constructs a fully specified event, typically used when reading from Firestore.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Events

      public Events()
      No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization. Initializes an empty waiting list and sets waitlist limit to -1 (unlimited).

    • Events

      public Events(String name, String date, String description, String location)
      Constructs a minimal event with core details. Status defaults to open and waitlist limit defaults to -1(unlimited).
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of the event
      date - the date of the event
      description - a full description of the event
      location - the location where the event will be held

    • Events

      public Events(String eventId, String organizerId, String name, String date, String description, String location, int capacity, String status, com.google.firebase.Timestamp createdAt)
      Constructs a fully specified event, typically used when reading from Firestore. Initializes an empty waiting list and sets waitlist limit to {-1 (unlimited).
      Parameters:
      eventId - the unique Firestore document ID
      organizerId - the ID of the organizer who created the event
      name - the display name of the event
      date - the date of the event
      description - a full description of the event
      location - the location where the event will be held
      capacity - the maximum number of attendees
      status - the current status open, closed, cancelled
      createdAt - the Firestore timestamp of when the event was created

  • Method Details

    • getWaitlistLimit

      public int getWaitlistLimit()
      Returns the maximum number of entrants allowed on the waitlist.
      Returns:
      the waitlist limit, or -1 if there is no limit

    • setWaitlistLimit

      public void setWaitlistLimit(int waitlistLimit)
      Sets the maximum number of entrants allowed on the waitlist.
      Parameters:
      waitlistLimit - the limit to set; use -1 for no limit

    • hasWaitlistLimit

      public boolean hasWaitlistLimit()
      Returns whether this event has a waitlist limit set.
      Returns:
      true if a limit is set, false if unlimited

    • addToWaitingList

      public void addToWaitingList(Entrant entrant)
      Adds an entrant to the waiting list if they are not already on it.
      Parameters:
      entrant - the Entrant to add
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the waitlist is full

    • removeFromWaitingList

      public void removeFromWaitingList(Entrant entrant)
      Removes an entrant from the waiting list if they are present.
      Parameters:
      entrant - the entrant to remove

    • isOnWaitingList

      public boolean isOnWaitingList(Entrant entrant)
      Returns whether the given entrant is currently on the waiting list.
      Parameters:
      entrant - the Entrant to check
      Returns:
      true if the entrant is on the waiting list, false otherwise

    • getWaitingList

      public WaitingList getWaitingList()
      Returns the waiting list associated with this event.
      Returns:
      the Waiting list for this event

    • setWaitingList

      public void setWaitingList(WaitingList waitingList)
      Sets the waiting list for this event. If null is provided, a new empty waiting list is assigned instead.
      Parameters:
      waitingList - the waiting list to assign

    • getWaitingListCount

      public int getWaitingListCount()
      Returns the current number of entrants on the waiting list.
      Returns:
      the waitlist headcount

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns:
      the unique Firestore document ID for this event

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Parameters:
      eventId - the Firestore document ID to assign

    • getOrganizerId

      public String getOrganizerId()
      Returns:
      the ID of the organizer who created this event

    • setOrganizerId

      public void setOrganizerId(String organizerId)
      Parameters:
      organizerId - the organizer ID to assign

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      the display name of the event

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - the display name to assign

      Returns:
      the date of the event

    • setDate

      public void setDate(String date)
      Parameters:
      date - the date to assign

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns:
      the full description of the event

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Parameters:
      description - the description to assign

      public String getLocation()
      Returns:
      the location of the event

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location)
      Parameters:
      location - the location to assign

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns:
      the maximum number of attendees

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(int capacity)
      Parameters:
      capacity - the capacity to assign

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns:
      the current status of the event

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Parameters:
      status - the status to assign ("open", "closed", or "cancelled")

    • getCreatedAt

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getCreatedAt()
      Returns:
      the Firestore timestamp of when this event was created

    • setCreatedAt

      public void setCreatedAt(com.google.firebase.Timestamp createdAt)
      Parameters:
      createdAt - the creation timestamp to assign

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Returns:
      the category of the event

    • setCategory

      public void setCategory(String category)
      Parameters:
      category - the category to assign

    • getEventTimestamp

      public long getEventTimestamp()
      Returns:
      the event timestamp for availability checks

    • setEventTimestamp

      public void setEventTimestamp(long eventTimestamp)
      Parameters:
      eventTimestamp - the event timestamp to assign

    • getImageUrl

      public String getImageUrl()
      Returns:
      the download URL of the event image

    • setImageUrl

      public void setImageUrl(String imageUrl)
      Parameters:
      imageUrl - the download URL of the event image to assign

    • isPrivate

      public boolean isPrivate()
      Returns:
      isPrivate whether the event is private or not

    • setPrivate

      public void setPrivate(boolean isPrivate)
      Parameters:
      isPrivate - the private notation to assign to an event

    • isGeolocationRequired

      public boolean isGeolocationRequired()
      Returns:
      geolocationRequired whether the event needs geolocation

    • setGeolocationRequired

      public void setGeolocationRequired(boolean geolocationRequired)
      Parameters:
      geolocationRequired - the notation to assign an event if it needs geolocation or not

    • getRegistrationStart

      public String getRegistrationStart()
      Returns:
      registrationStart when event registration begins

    • setRegistrationStart

      public void setRegistrationStart(String registrationStart)
      Parameters:
      registrationStart - the field to fill out when creating an event

    • getRegistrationEnd

      public String getRegistrationEnd()
      Returns:
      registrationEnd when event registration ends

    • setRegistrationEnd

      public void setRegistrationEnd(String registrationEnd)
      Parameters:
      registrationEnd - the field to fill out when creating an event

    • getCoOrganizerIds

      public List<String> getCoOrganizerIds()
      Returns:
      getCoOrganizerIds coOrganizerIds for an event

    • setCoOrganizerIds

      public void setCoOrganizerIds(List<String> coOrganizerIds)
      Parameters:
      coOrganizerIds - the coOrganizerIds for the event

    • getDetails

      public String getDetails()
      Returns:
      getDetails details for an event

    • setDetails

      public void setDetails(String details)
      Parameters:
      details - the details for the event

    • getTags

      public List<String> getTags()
      Returns:
      getTags tags for an event

    • setTags

      public void setTags(List<String> tags)
      Parameters:
      tags - the tags for the event
